use std::sync::mpsc;
use std::thread;

fn process_items_bounded(items: Vec<String>, max_threads: usize) {
    let (tx, rx) = mpsc::channel();
    let rx = std::sync::Arc::new(std::sync::Mutex::new(rx));

    let mut handles = Vec::new();
    for _ in 0..max_threads {
        let rx = rx.clone();
        handles.push(thread::spawn(move || {
            while let Ok(item) = rx.lock().unwrap().recv() {
                process_one(&item);
            }
        }));
    }

    for item in items {
        tx.send(item).unwrap();
    }
    drop(tx);

    for handle in handles {
        handle.join().unwrap();
    }
}

fn parallel_map_chunked(items: Vec<u64>) -> Vec<u64> {
    let chunk_size = items.len() / num_cpus::get().max(1);
    let mut handles = Vec::new();

    for chunk in items.chunks(chunk_size) {
        let chunk = chunk.to_vec();
        handles.push(thread::spawn(move || -> Vec<u64> {
            chunk.iter().map(|x| x * 2).collect()
        }));
    }

    handles.into_iter().flat_map(|h| h.join().unwrap()).collect()
}

fn process_one(_item: &str) {}
